sections.title: Introduction
sections.phrase: The aim of this report is to assess school facilities.
bullets: feedback from 200+ students
a student council survey

sections.title: Current Situation
sections.phrase: It is generally agreed that the facilities are in reasonable condition.
bullets: classrooms and IT are well maintained
the sports hall is fully equipped

sections.title: Problems
sections.phrase: However, one major concern expressed by students is the overcrowded library.
bullets: outdated toilet facilities
poor heating and weak Wi-Fi in older buildings

sections.title: Recommendations
sections.phrase: I would strongly recommend renovating the toilet facilities as a matter of urgency.
sections.idea: It would also be advisable to
bullets: extend library hours and add more study desks
improve Wi-Fi coverage throughout the school

sections.title: Conclusion
sections.phrase: To sum up, the school facilities are generally adequate but require significant investment in key areas.
bullets: greatly enhance the learning environment for all students
demonstrate a clear commitment to student wellbeing

sections.title: Introduction
sections.phrase: The aim of this report is to evaluate the two-week exchange programme in Valencia.
bullets: feedback from 15 participating students
observations from March 2025

sections.title: Accommodation & Activities
sections.phrase: By far the best aspect of the trip was the host family experience.
bullets: students spoke Spanish at mealtimes daily
cultural visits included museums and theatre

sections.title: Learning Outcomes
sections.phrase: It is generally agreed that students' confidence improved dramatically.
bullets: authentic language use in real situations
lasting international friendships were formed

sections.title: Recommendations
sections.phrase: I would strongly recommend continuing the programme in future years.
sections.idea: It would also be advisable to
bullets: offer pre-departure language lessons
improve communication with host families beforehand

sections.title: Conclusion
sections.phrase: Taking everything into account, the exchange programme was an invaluable educational experience.
sections.idea: On balance, the benefits of this programme
bullets: far exceed those of traditional classroom learning
justify its continuation and further development

sections.title: Introduction
sections.phrase: The aim of this report is to assess the local sports centre facilities.
bullets: a youth survey of 120 responses
current usage statistics for the 14–18 age group

sections.title: Existing Facilities
sections.phrase: It is generally agreed that some facilities are in reasonable condition.
bullets: the football pitch is well maintained
the swimming pool is popular with members

sections.title: Improvements Needed
sections.phrase: However, one major concern expressed by young people is the outdated gym equipment.
bullets: opening hours do not suit school schedules
membership prices are too high for teenagers

sections.title: Recommendations
sections.phrase: I would strongly recommend modernising the gym equipment as a matter of urgency.
sections.idea: It would also be advisable to
bullets: introduce a student discount scheme
extend evening opening hours until 9pm

sections.title: Conclusion
sections.phrase: To sum up, the sports centre has the potential to become a thriving hub for young people.
bullets: significantly increase youth participation in sport
benefit the wider community as a whole

sections.title: Introduction
sections.phrase: The aim of this report is to evaluate the three-day educational trip to Bath.
bullets: feedback from 32 Year 10 students
observations from November 2024

sections.title: Accommodation & Activities
sections.phrase: By far the best aspect of the trip was the Roman Baths tour.
bullets: the youth hostel was clean and comfortable
walking tours of historical sites were well organised

sections.title: Feedback & Problems
sections.phrase: However, one major concern expressed by students was the distance from the hostel to the sites.
bullets: excessive time was wasted on transport
some workshops were too long for the age group

sections.title: Recommendations
sections.phrase: I would strongly recommend booking accommodation closer to the city centre.
sections.idea: It would also be advisable to
bullets: shorten workshop sessions to 45 minutes
allow students some free time for independent exploration

sections.title: Conclusion
sections.phrase: Taking everything into account, the trip to Bath was a worthwhile and memorable experience.
sections.idea: On balance, addressing these issues should
bullets: make future trips even more educational and enjoyable
ensure students gain the maximum benefit from their time

sections.title: Introduction
sections.phrase: The aim of this report is to review the school library services.
bullets: a survey of 150 library users
an analysis of current usage patterns

sections.title: Current Services
sections.phrase: It is generally agreed that the library offers a good range of resources.
bullets: a wide selection of fiction and reference books
helpful and knowledgeable staff

sections.title: Problems Identified
sections.phrase: However, one major concern expressed by students is that the library closes too early.
bullets: insufficient seating during the exam period
no access to digital books or online resources

sections.title: Recommendations
sections.phrase: I would strongly recommend extending the opening hours until 5:30pm.
sections.idea: It would also be advisable to
bullets: purchase additional computers for student use
introduce an e-book subscription service

sections.title: Conclusion
sections.phrase: To sum up, the library plays a vital role in students' academic success.
bullets: transform the library into a truly modern learning resource
have a direct and positive impact on student results

sections.title: Introduction
sections.phrase: The aim of this report is to evaluate the two-week work experience placement.
bullets: a placement at Green Design Studios
observations from July 2024

sections.title: Company & Tasks
sections.phrase: By far the best aspect of the placement was the variety of tasks.
bullets: assisting with social media and client presentations
shadowing senior designers in meetings

sections.title: Skills Developed
sections.phrase: It is generally agreed that the placement developed key professional skills.
bullets: communication and time management improved significantly
experience was gained with industry design software

sections.title: Recommendations
sections.phrase: I would strongly recommend continuing this placement for future students.
sections.idea: It would also be advisable to
bullets: prepare students with basic software skills beforehand
target students with an interest in creative industries

sections.title: Conclusion
sections.phrase: Taking everything into account, this work experience placement was an outstanding success.
bullets: genuine insight into a professional creative environment
skills that cannot be gained in a classroom setting

sections.title: Introduction
sections.phrase: The aim of this report is to assess the school cafeteria services.
bullets: feedback from 180 students
an assessment of food quality, choice, and pricing

sections.title: Current Situation
sections.phrase: It is generally agreed that the cafeteria provides an adequate service.
bullets: the salad bar is popular with students
prices remain reasonable for most students

sections.title: Main Complaints
sections.phrase: However, one major concern expressed by students is the lack of menu variety.
bullets: no vegetarian options are available most days
long queues waste too much of the lunch break

sections.title: Recommendations
sections.phrase: I would strongly recommend introducing daily vegetarian and vegan options.
sections.idea: It would also be advisable to
bullets: expand the menu to five or six choices
introduce an app-based pre-ordering system

sections.title: Conclusion
sections.phrase: To sum up, the cafeteria requires meaningful improvements to meet students' needs.
bullets: lead to a healthier and happier student body
reduce stress and wasted time during the lunch break

sections.title: Introduction
sections.phrase: The aim of this report is to evaluate the Eco-Schools Green Flag initiative.
bullets: observations from September to December 2024
the active participation of 85 students

sections.title: Project Activities
sections.phrase: By far the best aspect of the project was the school-wide recycling system.
bullets: 50 trees were planted around the campus
water-saving devices were successfully installed

sections.title: Achievements & Difficulties
sections.phrase: It is generally agreed that the project achieved outstanding results.
bullets: initial resistance from some students and staff
a limited budget which restricted several plans

sections.title: Recommendations
sections.phrase: I would strongly recommend organising similar projects on a regular basis.
sections.idea: It would also be advisable to
bullets: appoint dedicated student eco-representatives
integrate environmental awareness into the curriculum

sections.title: Conclusion
sections.phrase: Taking everything into account, the long-term benefits of this initiative clearly outweigh the challenges.
sections.idea: On balance, continuing this work would
bullets: establish the school as a leader in environmental education
inspire a lasting culture of sustainability among students

sections.title: Introduction
sections.phrase: The aim of this report is to review the youth club facilities on Mill Road.
bullets: a survey of 95 current and former members
a focus on the 13–18 age group

sections.title: Current Facilities
sections.phrase: It is generally agreed that the club offers a reasonable range of activities.
bullets: a games room with a pool table and consoles
an art studio used twice weekly

sections.title: Issues Identified
sections.phrase: However, one major concern expressed by members is the lack of activities for older teenagers.
bullets: opening hours do not suit school schedules
there is no Wi-Fi available for members

sections.title: Recommendations
sections.phrase: I would strongly recommend installing Wi-Fi as an immediate priority.
sections.idea: It would also be advisable to
bullets: invest in modern music production equipment
open later in the evenings until 9pm

sections.title: Conclusion
sections.phrase: To sum up, the youth club has a strong foundation but must modernise to retain its members.
bullets: attract significantly more young people to the club
create a genuinely welcoming space for teenagers in the community

sections.title: Introduction
sections.phrase: The aim of this report is to evaluate the intensive French course in Paris.
bullets: a three-week course in August 2024
a class of 12 international students

sections.title: Teaching & Materials
sections.phrase: By far the best aspect of the course was the focus on practical conversation.
bullets: qualified native-speaking teachers throughout
engaging role-play and interactive activities

sections.title: Effectiveness & Problems
sections.phrase: It is generally agreed that speaking confidence improved significantly.
bullets: the pace was sometimes too fast for students
grammar explanations were occasionally unclear

sections.title: Recommendations
sections.phrase: I would strongly recommend providing a clearer level assessment at the start of the course.
sections.idea: It would also be advisable to
bullets: include more short breaks during the four-hour sessions
offer additional grammar support for weaker students

sections.title: Conclusion
sections.phrase: Taking everything into account, this was an excellent course that delivered real language progress.
bullets: to be far more effective than standard school lessons
an experience well worth the time and investment
